mapper.select: SELECT ra.id, ra.release_id, ra.artifact_name, ra.artifact_type, ra.file_name, ra.file_path, ra.file_size, ra.file_hash, ra.download_url, ra.download_count, ra.uploaded_by, ra.uploaded_at, ra.metadata, rp.name AS release_name, su.username AS uploaded_by_name FROM release_artifact ra LEFT JOIN release_plan rp ON ra.release_id = rp.id AND rp.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON ra.uploaded_by = su.id AND su.deleted = 0 ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY ra.uploaded_at DESC
